original_statement: after 2011, what engine did team penske use?
mutated_statement: after 2011, what engine did the racing team both adopt and refuse to adopt?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action contradiction/expansion + Article insertion: 'team penske'→'the racing team' (specific entity→generic reference) | 'use'→'both adopt and refuse to adopt' (single affirmative action→contradictory dual actions introducing refusal/negation) | added definite article (no article→'the').

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought与chain中可识别关键信息：日志明确指出“2012、2013 = chevrolet”且“Honda出现在2006–2011但未出现在2011之后”。agent在simple_query后给出结论：采纳Chevrolet且未在2011后采用Honda。表现为识别到变异问题的内在矛盾（既要求“采用”又要求“拒绝采用”同一实体），未拒绝回答或要求澄清，而是通过查表与逻辑推理将矛盾合理化为“说明哪一款被采纳、哪一款未被采纳”的事实性回答。因此归类为通过事实与逻辑解释来化解矛盾的行为。
